_comment: SIMFID clone-drive manifest — the headless-drivable subset of SIMFID_CASES (lab/simfid/cases.ts). Each case's `id` MUST match a case id there so its fresh app delta OVERRIDES the banked-evidence golden. This starter set is the most pre-state-immune cases (single-row status/trash flips + pure inserts); the first successful clone drive validates the harness end-to-end, after which the CRUD cases with subtler pre-states (inbox-promotion start values, tag/checklist joins) are added with confirmed CLI seeding. The recurrence family stays on RSIM evidence-derived goldens (tier-3 ui-vector — needs the AXVM1 Accessibility grant, out of scope for this headless driver).
